name: faithful_fully_covered
answer: Chris runs two NVIDIA RTX A4500 GPUs connected with NVLink. [source: infrastructure]

chunks.title: AI Portfolio System
chunks.content: The system runs on a Dell Precision T5810 with two RTX A4500 20 GB GPUs connected via NVLink (40 GB aggregate), tensor-parallel.

name: hallucinated_unsupported_claim
answer: Chris runs four NVIDIA H100 GPUs in a custom liquid-cooled rack. [source: infrastructure]

chunks.title: AI Portfolio System
chunks.content: The system runs on a Dell Precision T5810 with two RTX A4500 20 GB GPUs connected via NVLink.

name: contradicted_claim
query: What inference engine serves the model?
answer: The model is served with Ollama on a single GPU. [source: infrastructure]

chunks.title: AI Portfolio System
chunks.content: The model is served with vLLM 0.14.0, tensor-parallel across two A4500 GPUs.

name: refusal_not_scored
answer: I don't have that documented in my knowledge base.

name: paraphrase_still_supported
query: How is the home server reached from the cloud?
answer: The public VPS talks to the home machine over an encrypted SSH tunnel. [source: infrastructure]

chunks.title: AI Portfolio System
chunks.content: Backend services bind to localhost on the T5810; the cloud server reaches them only through an SSH reverse tunnel with key-based authentication.

name: category_swap_vram_as_storage
query: Tell me about the GPU home lab setup
answer: The two RTX A4500 GPUs each have 20 GB of GDDR6 memory and 40 GB of storage. [source: infrastructure]

chunks.title: Homelab T5810
chunks.content: 2x NVIDIA RTX A4500, 20 GB GDDR6 VRAM per card (40 GB aggregate across the pair). This is video memory (VRAM), not disk storage; the A4500 has no onboard storage.

name: role_swap_cpu_as_gpu
answer: It leverages both the NVIDIA and AMD GPUs on the asrock box. [source: infrastructure]

chunks.title: Homelab T5810
chunks.content: The asrock B550 verifier node has an AMD Ryzen 9 5950X CPU (16C/32T) and a single NVIDIA RTX 3060 Ti GPU. The Ryzen 9 is a CPU, not a GPU.

name: true_crossmachine_fact_with_evidence
answer: The asrock box has an AMD Ryzen 9 5950X and a single RTX 3060 Ti, and it runs the out-of-band faithfulness verification. [source: infrastructure]

chunks.title: Homelab T5810
chunks.content: asrock B550 verifier node: AMD Ryzen 9 5950X (16C/32T), 64 GB RAM, a single RTX 3060 Ti (8 GB). Runs the out-of-band faithfulness verifier.
